eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 4:53 PM on JUN 10, 2026 Effective until 5:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING. Storms will likely bring heavy rainfall, strong winds with the possibility of hail. 
TORNADO WATCH UNTIL 9PM remains in effect
